suggestionsDescription: We detected these potential recurring expenses. Confirm to track them or dismiss if not recurring.
pausedDescription: These patterns are no longer active. Historical expense data is preserved.
emptyDescription: Click "Detect Patterns" to analyze your transactions and find recurring expenses like subscriptions and bills.

pauseDialog.title: Pause Recurring Pattern
pauseDialog.removeFromTotal: Remove it from your monthly recurring total
pauseDialog.keepHistorical: Keep all historical expense data linked
pauseDialog.manualResume: If a new payment arrives, it will need to be manually resumed.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Recurring Pattern
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This will unlink all associated expenses and mark them as variable. The pattern can be re-detected if it appears again.

resumeDialog.title: Resume Recurring Pattern
resumeDialog.addBackToTotal: Add it back to your monthly recurring total
resumeDialog.includeInAnalytics: Include it in analytics and forecasts
